items.title: Solana hits record 167M holders in April – Will SOL price follow?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The surge to 167 million holders indicates growing interest in Solana, which could positively influence SOL's market dynamics and liquidity.

items.title: Bitcoin under $71,000, ETH, SOL, XRP drop as Iran ceasefire frays within 48 hours of being signed
items.whyYouShouldCare: The recent drop in SOL's price, alongside Bitcoin and ETH, reflects broader market volatility that could impact investor sentiment and trading activity.

items.title: Solana Foundation to Help Secure DeFi Protocols Following $285 Million Drift Hack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Solana Foundation's initiative to secure DeFi protocols post-hack is crucial for restoring confidence and enhancing the ecosystem's resilience.
